prompt: Design a luxury minimalist fashion accessory logo using the flower exactly outline in the first image and the black-and-white floral alphabet from the second, with the pink color in the third image.
prompt_refined: Generate a luxury minimalist fashion accessory logo. The design must incorporate the exact single-line flower illustration from image 1. Any textual elements within the logo should be styled using the black-and-white floral alphabet seen in image 2. The primary color used in the logo should be the distinct pink hue from image 3.
objects: Black-and-white floral alphabet styling (for textual elements, from Image 2)
Distinct pink hue (from Image 3) as the primary color of the logo
